name: Catapult
preceding_figure_names: American Spin, Change of Places Left to Right, Change of Places Right to Left, Chugging, Rolling Off the Arm, Shoulder Spin
following_figure_names: Change of Places Left to Right, American Spin, Rolling Off the Arm, Miami Special, Shoulder Spin, Chugging, Link, Change of Hands Behind Back, Hip Bump, Stop and Go
notes: Return to L to R or R to R hand hold at end of Lady's turn. Man may turn 1/4 to L over steps 14-16, then Lady would turn 1/4 to R. Lady should feel she is pulling away from Man. This is the Catapult part of the figure.

comments: R hand to R side. On step 5, raise R hand and start to circle it counterclockwise over Lady's head.

steps.action: Continue to circle R hand counter-clockwise, then lower it behind back, taking Lady's L hand in L hand behind back.
Replace weight to RF, having moved it slightly rightwards

comments: Release hold with R hand and take L hand fwd in front of body to lead Lady well fwd. Lead Lady to turn R and release hold with L hand.

steps.action: Compact chasse RLR. End in Open Position
comments: Return to L to R or R to R hand hold at end of Lady's turn. Man may turn 1/4 to L over steps 14-16, then Lady would turn 1/4 to R.

steps.action: Fwd chasse RLR to Man's R side
Turning chasse underarm LRL. End LF back in Tandem Position behind Man.

comments: Lady should feel she is pulling away from Man. This is the Catapult part of the figure.

steps.action: Fwd chasse RLR passing Man's L side, then turn to R on RF
comments: 7/8 to R between step 12 and 13, then 7/8 to R on RF

steps.action: LF to side and slightly back to chasse LRL. End LF back in Open Position.
